productDisplayName: Nike Women Nike Purple Tote Purple Bags
description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this purple tote from nike will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go shopping, for a movie or to college. It's large enough to accomodate all your essentials and neat enough to get you loads of attention from strangers! Measurement Height: 40 cm Width: 44 cm Depth: 16 cm Capacity: 26 litres Made of 55% nylon, 35% polyurethane and 10% polyester for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Water-resistant tarpaulin bttom One main roomy zippered compartment with a small fleece-lined zippered pocket to hold essentials short handles for carrying ease Cushioned tubular handle cunstruction for added comfort Branded zippers and sliders for easy use nike Swoosh appliqued on the front for branding and added attraction Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
